register.title: Create a new account

register.instructorDesc: Create courses and share your expertise
register.referralHelper: Friend code — separate from discount coupons. Used once at registration.

layout.taglineFallback: The learning platform that matches your ambition
layout.heroDesc: Join thousands of learners and instructors and start your journey toward professional growth with a modern, integrated learning experience.
layout.feature1Desc: Learn flexibly from top instructors at a time that suits you.
layout.feature2Desc: Document your achievements with recognized professional certificates after each path.
layout.feature3Desc: Structured content that takes you from basics to mastery step by step.
layout.maintenanceDesc: Some services may be limited. You can sign in if you already have an account.
